## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's potential participation in SEMrush's Spotlight event, exploring speaking and sponsorship opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEMrush has capacity for mastermind sessions (50 min, 10 people) but keynote stages are overbooked](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX CEO) hesitant about committing a week for limited audience reach; exploring higher-impact options](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Potential for sponsorship, keynote/panel participation, or expanded mastermind sessions to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [GrowthX is a heavy SEMrush API user, in Enterprise Solution negotiations, presenting partnership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

## Topics

### Mastermind Session Format

  - [50-minute sessions with 10 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Flexible, intimate "ask me anything" style](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [No deck required, speaker can shape narrative](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Highly rated by attendees, possibility for multiple tables](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Speaker intro, attendee intros, free-flow discussion](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Pre-event questionnaire option for attendee challenges/questions](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### GrowthX's Participation Concerns

  - [CEO Marcel hesitant about week-long commitment for limited reach](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Seeking higher-impact opportunities (e.g., addressing 100 CMOs)](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Exploring balance between travel investment and audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Considering sponsorship to maximize presence and value](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Potential Speaking Opportunities

  - [Mastermind sessions available, can add more if popular](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Possible keynote/panel slot due to recent speaker dropouts](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Marina to check internally about main stage client presentation](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Decision pending on SEMrush-led content vs. external speakers](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Sponsorship and Accommodation

  - [Sponsorship options available, details to be provided](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Marina can potentially offer 2 nights accommodation (vs. standard 1 night)](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Suggestion to create an "activation" for memorable brand presence](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### GrowthX and SEMrush Relationship

  - [GrowthX is a heavy SEMrush API user and customer](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [In contract negotiations for Enterprise Solution](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Potential partnership opportunities being explored](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX works with major brands (Webflow, Ramp, Reddit, Lovable) as content arm](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Opportunity to promote SEMrush tools (e.g., Prowly) to GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Alternative Engagement Ideas

  - [Marcel considering organizing a dinner event around the conference](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Possibility of bringing GrowthX European team members (15 out of 75 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to continue Enterprise Solution negotiations with SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/o4vz93v5s2mGtkiBrngUk6_nyk_if4VU?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
